description.value:
Red Mantis insignia-helm (Appendix 5; 6,000 gp → 600 gp). Invested. 3 charges per day, restored at dawn. Spend 1 charge (1 action, concentrate) for one of the following, lasting 30 minutes (effects can run simultaneously):

  • Hunter's eyes: darkvision.
  • See the unseen: as see the unseen — invisible creatures appear as shimmering outlines.
  • Deathwatch: you sense whether creatures you see are alive, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying}, undead, or neither.
  • Vigil: +2 item bonus to Perception.

Standard issue for Red Mantis assassins (a copy rides in their inventory); Mistress Kayltanya's is rubied.

publication.title: Pathfinder: Curse of the Crimson Throne (PF2e conversion, private)
